title: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz Announces Investigation of Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (LYV) on Behalf of Investors
text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announces an investigation of Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (“Live Nation” or the “Company”) (NYSE: LYV) on behalf of investors concerning the Company's possible violations of federal securities laws. title: Live Nation reportedly focus of Justice Department antitrust probe
text: Ticketmaster parent Live Nation Entertainment Inc. LYV, -7.84% is expected to become the focus of an antitrust suit from the U.S. Department of Justice by the end of the year, according to a report late Friday. Citing three unidentified sources close to the matter, Politico reported Friday that the DoJ intends to claim Live Nation is abusing its power in the live music industry.

title: DOJ reportedly may sue Ticketmaster parent Live Nation in wake of Taylor Swift ticket fiasco
text: Earlier this year, senators slammed Live Nation's lack of transparency and inability to block bot purchases of tickets following a major fiasco involving ticket sales for Taylor Swift's long-awaited concert tour.

title: Live Nation says concert industry will stay hot for at least 2 more years
text: Wall Street has wondered how much longer the good times will last for the concert industry, after it roared back to life last year following two years of pandemic shutdowns.

title: Live Nation Entertainment's (LYV) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Top
text: Live Nation Entertainment's (LYV) second-quarter 2023 results benefit from pent-up demand for live events and robust ticket sales.

title: U.S. DOJ may file antitrust lawsuit against Live Nation Entertainment - Politico
text: The U.S. Justice Department could file an antitrust lawsuit against concert promoter Live Nation Entertainment and its subsidiary Ticketmaster by the end of the year, Politico reported on Friday.

title: Live Nation Sales Surge. Demand for Concerts Isn't Going to Let Up, Say Analysts.
text: Live Nation's second-quarter revenue jumps 27% as concert sales spike 29%.

title: Live Nation (LYV) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Live Nation (LYV) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Live Nation (LYV) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Live Nation (LYV) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.02 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.57 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.66 per share a year ago.

title: Ticketmaster parent Live Nation's revenue surges on red-hot concert demand
text: Ticketmaster parent Live Nation Entertainment beat Wall Street estimates for second-quarter revenue on Thursday, helped by high prices of concert tickets and pent-up demand after the pandemic.

title: Live Nation stock rises as Q2 results beat estimates, concert rebound continues unabated
text: Shares of Live Nation Entertainment Inc. rose after hours on Thursday after the concert-venue and ticketing giant reported second-quarter results that beat estimates and forecast “record” results for 2023, with more gains ahead next year.

title: Live Nation Entertainment Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: LOS ANGELES , July 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- "Live music is bigger than ever, with global demand driving the industry to record levels. There's a more diverse pipeline of artists breaking from all corners of the world, and at the same time tours are going to more markets - particularly in Latin America and Asia.

title: Live Nation (LYV) to Post Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Live Nation Entertainment's (LYV) second-quarter 2023 results are likely to be aided by an increase in demand for live events, a rise in average per-fan spending and a hike in ticket pricing.

title: Tune Into Stocks From the Global Music Industry for Huge Gains
text: As music world resonates with growth, savvy investors can play stocks like Spotify (SPOT), Apple Music (AAPL), Amazon Music (AMZN), Sony Corporation (SONY) and Live Nation (LYV).

title: Live Nation Shares Rock Out Ahead of Q2 Earnings
text: In May 2023, concert promoter Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. NYSE: LYV announced first-quarter financials that brought the house down. Its stock rally since suggests investors want an encore performance.

title: Fresh outrage after Ticketmaster halts Taylor Swift ticket sales in France
text: NEW YORK — The trouble between Ticketmaster and Taylor Swift's “Eras” tour isn't over — with the latest snafu impacting fans hoping to score tickets in France.

title: Why Live Nation Stock Gained 14% Last Month
text: Live Nation's consumer-friendly "all-in pricing" policy received a warm welcome, triggering a 4% rise in stock prices on the announcement day. Public outcry over steep prices for high-profile tours triggered the proposed Boss and Swift Act of 2023 in Congress.

title: Live Nation Launches App Blending Music And Meditation
text: Live Nation is getting into the mindfulness business. The company, which controls the lion's share of the live events business and counts TicketMaster and Roc Nation as subsidiaries, launched an app called Mindful Nation that blends music and meditation, and is targeted at the general population.

title: DITA VON TEESE ANNOUNCES NEW LAS VEGAS RESIDENCY DITA LAS VEGAS: A JUBILANT REVUE AT HORSESHOE LAS VEGAS
text: General on sale begins Thursday, July 13 at 10 a.m. PT at ticketmaster.com/DitaVegas ; Show to debut in the Jubilee Theater on October 5, 2023 LAS VEGAS , July 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- International Queen of Burlesque, Dita Von Teese , announced today her premiere residency, DITA LAS VEGAS: A Jubilant Revue, at Horseshoe Las Vegas, opening in the Jubilee Theater on Thursday, Oct. 5, 2023.
